description: Airtable is a cloud-based spreadsheet-database hybrid that lets users create, share, and collaborate on structured data with a familiar spreadsheet interface and powerful database features.
authentication: API key (Bearer token) and OAuth 2.0 for app authentication
self_serve: Yes – users can sign up for free and create bases without assistance
api_surface: RESTful API with CRUD operations on records, tables, attachments, supports filtering, sorting, pagination, and batch requests; also offers Airtable Apps SDK and Zapier integration
buildability: High – provides API, SDKs, Airtable Apps, Zapier, and extensive documentation
main_blocker: Rate limits (5 requests/second per base) and limited query capabilities (no joins, limited filtering) constrain complex integrations
